mapper.select:
SELECT CONCAT('ASSET-', a.id) AS id, 'ASSET_OPERATION' AS logType, '资产操作' AS logTypeName, a.asset_id AS assetId, b.asset_code AS assetCode, b.asset_name AS assetName, a.operation_type AS businessType, NULL AS businessId, a.operation_name AS operation, a.before_status AS beforeStatus, a.after_status AS afterStatus, a.operator_name AS operatorName, DATE_FORMAT(a.operation_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS operationTime, a.remark AS remark, 'ASSET' AS source FROM asset_operation_log a LEFT JOIN asset b ON a.asset_id = b.id
AND a.operation_time >= #{startDate}
AND a.operation_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY a.operation_time DESC

SELECT CONCAT('APPROVAL-', ar.id) AS id, 'APPROVAL' AS logType, '审批操作' AS logTypeName, sub.asset_id AS assetId, b.asset_code AS assetCode, b.asset_name AS assetName, ai.business_type AS businessType, ai.business_id AS businessId, ar.action AS operation, NULL AS beforeStatus, ar.status AS afterStatus, ar.approver_name AS operatorName, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(ar.approved_at, ar.created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS operationTime, ar.comment AS remark, 'APPROVAL' AS source FROM approval_record ar JOIN approval_instance ai ON ar.instance_id = ai.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'RECEIVE' AS bt, id AS oid, asset_id FROM asset_receive_order UNION ALL SELECT 'TRANSFER' AS bt, id AS oid, asset_id FROM asset_transfer_order UNION ALL SELECT 'REPAIR' AS bt, id AS oid, asset_id FROM asset_repair_order UNION ALL SELECT 'SCRAP' AS bt, id AS oid, asset_id FROM asset_scrap_order ) sub ON ai.business_type = sub.bt AND ai.business_id = sub.oid LEFT JOIN asset b ON sub.asset_id = b.id
AND COALESCE(ar.approved_at, ar.created_at) >= #{startDate}
AND COALESCE(ar.approved_at, ar.created_at) < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY COALESCE(ar.approved_at, ar.created_at) DESC

SELECT CONCAT('INVENTORY-', ir.id) AS id, 'INVENTORY_ABNORMAL' AS logType, '盘点异常' AS logTypeName, ir.asset_id AS assetId, b.asset_code AS assetCode, b.asset_name AS assetName, 'INVENTORY' AS businessType, ir.task_id AS businessId, ir.result AS operation, NULL AS beforeStatus, NULL AS afterStatus, ir.actual_keeper AS operatorName, DATE_FORMAT(ir.scanned_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS operationTime, ir.remark AS remark, 'INVENTORY' AS source FROM inventory_record ir LEFT JOIN asset b ON ir.asset_id = b.id
ir.result IS NOT NULL AND ir.result != 'NORMAL'
AND ir.scanned_at >= #{startDate}
AND ir.scanned_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY ir.scanned_at DESC

SELECT CONCAT('FINANCE-', f.id) AS id, 'FINANCE_SYNC' AS logType, '财务同步' AS logTypeName, NULL AS assetId, NULL AS assetCode, NULL AS assetName, 'FINANCE' AS businessType, f.id AS businessId, f.status AS operation, NULL AS beforeStatus, NULL AS afterStatus, f.operator_name AS operatorName, DATE_FORMAT(f.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS operationTime, f.remark AS remark, 'FINANCE' AS source FROM finance_sync_record f
AND f.created_at >= #{startDate}
AND f.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_record WHERE result IS NOT NULL AND result != 'NORMAL'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM asset_operation_log WHERE operation_time >= #{todayStart}
